title: Lucid Shares Ruined By New CEO
text: Lucid's stock suffered significant declines following new CEO Silvio Napoli's April appointment and subsequent suspension of full-year guidance. The market interpreted the guidance suspension as a sign of deeper operational challenges than previously disclosed. Napoli's early actions included a 12% workforce reduction aimed at generating up to $500 million in savings over three years. The stock's poor performance reflected investor concerns about the company's ability to execute on its production roadmap and achieve profitability timelines. Market sentiment turned negative as investors weighed the cost-cutting measures against Lucid's ability to compete in the crowded EV market.
